track: rr-2 - Today is Yesterday x Make 'em say Errr
notes: Groundhog-day anxiety. Tight AAB triplets in verses. The hook's stutter 'over, over' is baked into the timing. 'You're on your way to nowhere now' is the thesis; in the final section it collapses to 'nowhere' without 'now' — auto-detection caught that. Long hold on 'You're' (1.84s at 3:39) is the breath mid-collapse.

chunks.note: Today is yesterday over, over again — hook #1 pt1, mixed = time doubling
Press rewind and play over, it never ends — hook #1 pt2
You're on your way to nowhere now — first payoff
You're on your way to nowhere now — second payoff
Today is yesterday over again — bridge into breakdown
You're on your way to nowhere now — the 1.84s 'You're' hold; biggest mid-song moment
